title: Remote assistance — reconnect and admin video fix
description:
Remote help on pipeshare.live is more reliable when the WebRTC path drops or the admin panel loses the customer video.

Customer and admin clients now queue signals during reconnect, restore recvonly transceivers, retry attach and signal polling, and guard teardown so a brief disconnect does not kill the session. Admin remote panel shows clearer viewport status and optional webrtcDebug.

Backend remote-signal events fan out through broadcastSupportEvents so SSE subscribers (admin queue) receive offers, answers, and ICE in real time.

Who is affected: PipeShare remote help over HTTPS (WebRTC). OVH non-SaaS deploy receives this via platform release dbg164.
changeLog: Signal queue and reconnect on customer WebRTC client.
Restore recvonly transceiver and stopPublishTracks on reconnect.
Signal poll resilience, attach retry, frame backup, teardown guards.
Admin panel viewport status and webrtcDebug hook.
Cache bust dbg164 on portal and customer-support addon.
